title: Challenge
description: Schema for handling challenge or step-up authentication actions and results (e.g., 3DS2).

display.description: The display mode for the action.

expires_at.description: RFC 3339 expiry timestamp indicating how long the host should wait for the action to complete.

status.description: The outcome of the authentication flow (e.g., 'authenticated', 'frictionless', 'attempted'). Optional, for platform observability and metrics.

action.description: Action requested by the business. Open-ended for Vendor-specific payloads.

action_result.description: Result reported by the platform. Open-ended for Vendor-specific result payloads.
